archetype: 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for Mobile CRM
mood: Premium, professional, energetic, and highly functional

rules.headings: Tracking-tight (`tracking-tight`), Font weight Bold (`font-bold`) to Black (`font-black`)
rules.body: Regular weight, slightly relaxed line height (`leading-relaxed`)
rules.overline: Uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (`tracking-[0.2em]`) for section headers or status tags

spacing_and_layout.mobile_container: Since this is a mobile web app acting as an Expo app, wrap the main view in `max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] relative overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white shadow-2xl` to simulate a phone viewport.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Use `p-4` or `p-5` for screen edges. Increase internal container padding to `p-6` for breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Use `rounded-2xl` or `rounded-3xl` for main cards, `rounded-full` for buttons and badges.
spacing_and_layout.kanban_board: Use `flex flex-row overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory gap-4 pb-4 scrollbar-hide` for the pipeline. Columns should be `min-w-[85%] snap-center`.

bottom_navigation.style: Glassmorphism. `fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 border-t border-white/10 pb-safe pt-2 px-4 z-50`
bottom_navigation.items: Flex justify-between. Active item uses `#FF6B00` icon/text. Inactive uses `#A3A3A3`.

cards.kpi_card: Minimalist, big numbers. Example: `text-3xl font-bold` for metric, `text-sm text-neutral-400` for label, tiny sparkline or arrow for trend.

buttons.primary: `bg-[#FF6B00] text-white rounded-full font-bold py-3 px-6 hover:bg-[#E66000] active:scale-95 transition-all`
buttons.secondary: `bg-white/10 text-white rounded-full font-semibold py-3 px-6 hover:bg-white/20 active:scale-95 transition-all`
buttons.fab: `absolute bottom-20 right-4 w-14 h-14 bg-[#FF6B00] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(255,107,0,0.4)] active:scale-90 z-40`

badges.style: `px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider`

inputs.style: `bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:border-[#FF6B00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF6B00] transition-all`

interactions.transitions: Use `framer-motion` for screen transitions (slide in/out), modal appearances (scale up), and tab switching.
interactions.micro_interactions: All touch targets must have `active:opacity-70` or `active:scale-95`.
interactions.scroll: Hide scrollbars via CSS (`::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }` or `scrollbar-width: none`).

properties.description: White luxury car parked in front of modern white house.

media.avatars: Generate UI avatars using standard UI Faces or Dicebear styles for CRM contacts.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `lucide-react` for consistent iconography. Use `framer-motion` for screen and tab animations.
Since this is a mobile CRM, enforce a mobile-constrained viewport layout (`max-w-md mx-auto`) with a fixed bottom navigation bar.
Implement JWT Auth context with email/password login screen using the orange/black branding.
Include sample seed data for Dashboard, Leads, Properties, Contacts, Deals (Kanban), and Tasks.
For the Kanban pipeline, use horizontal scroll `overflow-x-auto` with snap points for columns (New -> Contacted -> Site Visit -> Negotiation -> Closed).
Lead detail view must include a section for 'AI Summary' with a glassmorphism card or distinct border styling.
Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, list items) have a `data-testid` attribute following the `kebab-case` convention.
Make charts (like revenue or conversion rate) using Recharts or simple CSS-based sparklines with the #FF6B00 brand color.
